entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop targeted for improvement in drought tolerance of grain yield.

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to maintain productivity under water-limited conditions.

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The measure of agricultural productivity for the crop.

entities.name: QTL
entities.description: Quantitative trait loci identified for drought tolerance of grain yield.

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED SELECTION
entities.description: A breeding method using molecular markers to select for desired traits.

entities.name: INTROGRESSION
entities.description: The process of incorporating specific QTLs into a genetic background.

entities.name: HOMOZYGOUS INBRED LINE
entities.description: A genetically uniform line used as a background for the introgression of QTLs.

entities.name: IMPROVED HYBRIDS
entities.description: High-performing offspring resulting from marker-assisted breeding and backcrossing.

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED BACKCROSSING
entities.description: A breeding method used to produce improved hybrids by transferring QTLs.

entities.name: TOPCROSS POLLINATOR POPULATIONS
entities.description: Heterogeneous populations used in breeding to improve parental lines.

entities.name: ELITE BREEDING LINES
entities.description: High-quality genetic lines into which QTLs are incorporated to enhance cultivars.

entities.name: CULTIVARS
entities.description: Cultivated plant varieties whose performance is enhanced by the incorporation of QTLs.

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: The environmental stress condition characterized by water scarcity.
